name: Shakira
ai_summary: Shakira is an 18-year-old from Atlanta, GA with experience supporting an autistic child with online schooling and homework. She loves kids, has availability for full-time or part-time work, and would handle conflicts by having children sit down and work things out together.

I'm Shakira 18. Try to find work. I have work with a autistic child before. It wasn't like a book, like a paper work, but I work with him through his online, schooling help him get through the day. Help him do his homework.
 And stuff like that. I love kids. I love little kids and I just want to better myself and leave the field and that's it.
